title: Bi Weekly Tanker Report August 22 2023 5Xs3G
summary:
Main
• Summer blues for crude tankers as VLCC spot rates stabilize - So far, August has been a quiet month for crude tankers, with relatively few deals concluded and limited prospects on the horizon for the VLCC market. We remain in a transitional phase between the remaining late August Middle East cargoes and the upcoming potential rise in the September ones. Breaking it down further, the route from the Middle East to the U.S.
